productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Dresses
description: Composition Grey mélange sleeveless dress made of 100% cotton, with a round neck and a pleated and buttoned front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this grey mélange dress from united colors of benetton. The buttons and pleats along the front redefine your feminine side with much elan. Pair this with heeled sandals and long earrings for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8', Chest-33"
